hooks.command: git fetch origin 2>/dev/null && BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current) && if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]; then git rebase origin/main; elif git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null | grep -q worktrees; then echo "Current branch $BRANCH is up to date."; else git rebase origin/main; fi

ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && cd "$ROOT/frontend" && LOCK_HASH=$(md5 -q package-lock.json 2>/dev/null || md5sum package-lock.json 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f1) && CACHED_HASH=$(cat "$ROOT/.claude/.npm-checksum" 2>/dev/null) && if [ ! -d node_modules ] || [ "$LOCK_HASH" != "$CACHED_HASH" ]; then npm install --silent 2>/dev/null && echo "$LOCK_HASH" > "$ROOT/.claude/.npm-checksum" && echo 'Dependencies installed.'; else echo 'Dependencies up to date.'; fi

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current) && DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$DIRTY" ]; then STATUS='(dirty)'; else STATUS='(clean)'; fi && echo "{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Status: $STATUS

Recent commits:
$(git log --oneline -5)

Changed files vs origin/main:
$(git diff --name-only origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')"}}"

pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 -q 2>/dev/null && echo 'DB is ready.' || (docker compose ps db --format '{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -qi 'up' && echo 'DB is ready.' || echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠ DB 컨테이너가 실행 중이 아닙니다. make db를 실행하세요."}')
